title: SEO Blog Generator
seoTitle: SEO Blog Generator Prompt for High-Ranking Content
metaDescription: Generate long-form, high-ranking SEO blog posts using this optimized AI prompt.
prompt: Write a 1000-word SEO optimized blog post about [TOPIC]. Include keyword placement, headings (H2, H3), meta description, FAQs, and internal linking suggestions.

title: YouTube Script Writer
seoTitle: YouTube Script Writing AI Prompt for Viral Videos
metaDescription: Create engaging YouTube scripts with hooks, storytelling and strong CTAs.
prompt: Write a high-retention YouTube script about [TOPIC]. Start with a strong hook, include storytelling, engagement triggers, and a strong call-to-action.

title: Cold Email Generator
seoTitle: Cold Email Template Prompt for B2B Outreach
metaDescription: Generate high-converting cold emails that get responses from prospects.
prompt: Write a cold email to [PROSPECT_ROLE] at [COMPANY] about [SOLUTION]. Make it personalized, benefit-focused, and include a clear CTA. Keep it under 150 words.

title: E-commerce Product Description
seoTitle: AI Product Description Generator for E-commerce Sales
metaDescription: Create persuasive product descriptions that drive conversions.
prompt: Write a compelling product description for [PRODUCT_NAME]. Include features, benefits, use cases, and a clear value proposition. Make it SEO-friendly and conversion-optimized.

title: Instagram Caption Generator
seoTitle: Instagram Post Caption Prompt for Maximum Engagement
metaDescription: Create viral Instagram captions with hashtags and emojis.
prompt: Write an engaging Instagram caption for a [CONTENT_TYPE] post about [TOPIC]. Include relevant emojis, 5-10 hashtags, and a CTA. Keep it under 2200 characters.

title: Advanced SEO Strategy Planner
seoTitle: SEO Strategy Prompt for Enterprise Content Plans
metaDescription: Create comprehensive SEO strategies with keyword mapping and competitor analysis.
prompt: Create a comprehensive SEO strategy for [WEBSITE_NICHE]. Analyze top 5 competitors, identify keyword clusters, suggest content pillars, and create a 12-month content roadmap.

title: Viral Video Concept Generator
seoTitle: AI Video Idea Generator for Trending Content
metaDescription: Generate viral video concepts with trending angles and audience psychology.
prompt: Generate 5 viral video concept ideas for [TARGET_AUDIENCE] in [NICHE]. For each idea, include hook, trending angle, format, length, and viral potential score.

title: Sales Pitch Generator
seoTitle: Personalized Sales Pitch Prompt for B2B Deals
metaDescription: Create customized sales pitches that address buyer pain points.
prompt: Write a 5-minute sales pitch for [PRODUCT/SERVICE] targeting [BUYER_PERSONA]. Address their pain points, show ROI, include case studies, and end with a strong close.

title: Amazon Product Listing Optimizer
seoTitle: Amazon A+ Content and Listing SEO Prompt
metaDescription: Optimize Amazon listings for better visibility and conversions.
prompt: Optimize an Amazon product listing for [PRODUCT_NAME]. Improve title (max 200 chars), bullet points (5 points), description, and A+ content with lifestyle images layout.

title: TikTok Trend Creator
seoTitle: TikTok Content Ideas Using Trending Sounds & Formats
metaDescription: Generate TikTok video ideas that leverage trending sounds and formats.
prompt: Create 5 TikTok video ideas using trending sounds for [NICHE]. Include video duration, trending sound, dance moves/transitions, text overlays, and CTA.

title: Email Funnel Sequence Builder
seoTitle: Email Marketing Sequence Prompt for Lead Nurturing
metaDescription: Create 7-email sequences to convert leads into customers.
prompt: Create a 7-email nurture sequence for [PRODUCT/SERVICE]. Each email should: 1) Build trust, 2) Address objections, 3) Show social proof, 4) Create urgency, 5) Close the sale. Include subject lines and CTAs.

title: Keyword Research & Clustering
seoTitle: SEO Keyword Strategy Prompt for Content Planning
metaDescription: Identify high-volume, low-competition keywords for SEO campaigns.
prompt: Conduct keyword research for [TOPIC/NICHE]. Find 20 long-tail keywords with search intent, monthly volume estimates, competition level, and suggested content types.

title: Google Ads Copy Generator
seoTitle: Google Ads Headlines & Description Prompt
metaDescription: Create high-CTR Google Ads copy with optimized headlines and descriptions.
prompt: Write 5 variations of Google Ads copy for [PRODUCT/SERVICE]. Create 3 headlines (30 chars max each), 2 descriptions (90 chars max), and a landing page URL strategy.

title: Brand Voice & Messaging Guide
seoTitle: Brand Identity Prompt for Consistent Messaging
metaDescription: Define your brand voice, tone, and messaging framework.
prompt: Create a comprehensive brand voice guide for [COMPANY/BRAND]. Define personality traits, tone in different contexts, key messages, brand values, and example voice variations.

title: Customer Support Response Generator
seoTitle: AI Customer Service Response Prompt
metaDescription: Generate empathetic and solution-focused customer support responses.
prompt: Write a professional customer support response to address [CUSTOMER_ISSUE]. Be empathetic, acknowledge the problem, provide solutions, and ensure customer satisfaction.

title: Product Roadmap Builder
seoTitle: Product Development Roadmap Prompt
metaDescription: Create strategic product roadmaps with feature prioritization.
prompt: Create a 12-month product roadmap for [PRODUCT]. Include Q1-Q4 initiatives, feature descriptions, success metrics, resource requirements, and dependency mapping.

title: UI/UX Copywriting Generator
seoTitle: User Interface Copy Prompt for Better UX
metaDescription: Create clear, concise UI copy that guides users through products.
prompt: Write UI copy for [FEATURE/FLOW]. Create microcopy for buttons, input fields, error messages, success states, and helper text. Make it user-friendly and action-oriented.

title: Business Plan Generator
seoTitle: Startup Business Plan Prompt for Investors
metaDescription: Generate comprehensive business plans with financial projections.
prompt: Write a business plan for [BUSINESS_IDEA]. Include executive summary, market analysis, competitive landscape, business model, marketing strategy, operations plan, and 3-year financial projections.

title: Online Course Curriculum Builder
seoTitle: Course Development Prompt for EdTech
metaDescription: Create structured course curricula with learning objectives.
prompt: Create a complete course curriculum for '[COURSE_TITLE]'. Include learning objectives, module breakdown, lesson plans, assessment strategies, and student resources.

title: Listicle Blog Post Writer
seoTitle: Top 10 List Blog Post Prompt for High Traffic
metaDescription: Generate listicle blog posts optimized for engagement and SEO.
prompt: Write a 'Top [NUMBER] [TOPIC]' listicle blog post. Include intro, numbered list items with descriptions, real examples, and conclusion with CTA.

title: Twitter Thread Creator
seoTitle: Twitter Thread Prompt for Thought Leadership
metaDescription: Create viral Twitter threads that drive engagement and followers.
prompt: Create a 10-tweet thread about [TOPIC]. Start with a hook, follow with insights, use storytelling, and end with CTA. Make each tweet standalone interesting.

title: Webinar Script Writer
seoTitle: Webinar Presentation Script Prompt
metaDescription: Create engaging webinar scripts with slide notes and speaker cues.
prompt: Write a 60-minute webinar script for '[TOPIC]'. Include introduction, 3 main sections with key points, interactive elements, real-world examples, and conclusion with offer.

title: B2B Case Study Writer
seoTitle: Customer Case Study Prompt for Sales Enablement
metaDescription: Create compelling case studies that demonstrate ROI and results.
prompt: Write a B2B case study for [CUSTOMER]. Include challenge, solution, implementation, results with metrics, and lessons learned. Structure: 300-500 words.

title: Shopify Store Optimization Guide
seoTitle: E-commerce Conversion Rate Optimization Prompt
metaDescription: Optimize Shopify stores for higher conversion rates and AOV.
prompt: Create a Shopify store optimization guide for [STORE]. Include homepage optimization, product page improvements, checkout flow, trust signals, and upsell strategies.

title: LinkedIn Post Generator
seoTitle: Professional LinkedIn Content Prompt
metaDescription: Create LinkedIn posts for professional engagement and visibility.
prompt: Write a LinkedIn post about [TOPIC]. Include a relatable hook, key insight, actionable advice, relevant emoji, and engagement CTA. Keep it under 2000 characters.

title: Newsletter Content Calendar
seoTitle: Email Newsletter Editorial Calendar Prompt
metaDescription: Plan engaging newsletter content with editorial calendars.
prompt: Create a 12-week newsletter content plan for [TOPIC/NICHE]. Include topics, themes, content types, email subject lines, and engagement strategies.

title: Long-Form Sales Copywriting
seoTitle: Sales Page Copywriting Prompt for Conversions
metaDescription: Create long-form sales copy that converts readers to buyers.
prompt: Write a 2000-word sales page for [PRODUCT/SERVICE]. Include headline, subheadline, problem statement, agitation, solution, benefits, features, testimonials, objection handling, and CTA.

title: Facebook/Instagram Ads Generator
seoTitle: Meta Ads Copy Prompt for Campaign Performance
metaDescription: Create high-performing Meta (Facebook/Instagram) ad copy.
prompt: Create 5 variations of Meta ads copy for [PRODUCT]. Include primary text, headline, description, and CTA. Target audience: [AUDIENCE]. Focus on benefits and urgency.

title: Brand Storytelling Framework
seoTitle: Brand Story Development Prompt for Connection
metaDescription: Develop compelling brand stories that resonate with audiences.
prompt: Develop a brand story for [COMPANY]. Include founding story, mission, core values, customer impact, and brand narrative. Make it emotional and authentic.

title: FAQ Page Generator
seoTitle: SEO FAQ Page Prompt for Customer Support
metaDescription: Create comprehensive FAQ pages that answer common customer questions.
prompt: Create 20 FAQs for [PRODUCT/SERVICE]. Use question/answer format. Include common objections, technical details, pricing questions, and implementation queries.

title: User Story Generator
seoTitle: Agile User Story Prompt for Product Teams
metaDescription: Generate structured user stories for product development.
prompt: Write 10 user stories for [FEATURE]. Follow format: 'As a [USER], I want [ACTION], so that [BENEFIT].' Include acceptance criteria and technical notes.

title: Landing Page Copywriting
seoTitle: High-Converting Landing Page Copy Prompt
metaDescription: Create landing page copy optimized for conversions and lead generation.
prompt: Write compelling landing page copy for [OFFER]. Include hero section, benefits, features, social proof, FAQ, and CTA button copy. Optimize for mobile and desktop.

title: Competitive Analysis Report
seoTitle: Market Competitor Analysis Prompt
metaDescription: Analyze competitors and identify market opportunities.
prompt: Create a competitive analysis for [MARKET/NICHE]. Analyze 5 main competitors: strengths, weaknesses, pricing, marketing strategies, and unique selling points. Identify market gaps.

title: Lesson Plan Creator
seoTitle: Educational Lesson Plan Template Prompt
metaDescription: Develop structured lesson plans with learning outcomes.
prompt: Create a lesson plan for teaching [SUBJECT] to [GRADE_LEVEL]. Include objectives, materials, introduction, main activities, practice exercises, and assessment.

title: White Paper Writer
seoTitle: B2B White Paper Prompt for Thought Leadership
metaDescription: Create authoritative white papers that establish industry expertise.
prompt: Create a white paper on [TOPIC/TECHNOLOGY]. Include executive summary, problem statement, solutions, case studies, implementation guide, and conclusion.

title: PPC Keyword Strategy Builder
seoTitle: Google Ads Keyword Bidding Strategy Prompt
metaDescription: Build high-ROI PPC campaigns with keyword strategies.
prompt: Create a PPC keyword strategy for [PRODUCT/SERVICE]. Include keyword categories, bid strategy, negative keywords, landing page grouping, and budget allocation.

title: Influencer Outreach Email
seoTitle: Influencer Partnership Pitch Prompt
metaDescription: Create persuasive influencer outreach emails for collaborations.
prompt: Write an influencer outreach email to [INFLUENCER_TYPE] for [CAMPAIGN]. Include collaboration details, compensation, deliverables, and timeline.

title: Podcast Episode Outline
seoTitle: Podcast Show Notes and Episode Prompt
metaDescription: Create podcast episode outlines with talking points.
prompt: Create a podcast episode outline for '[EPISODE_TITLE]' on [TOPIC]. Include intro, 3-4 main discussion points, guest questions, listener takeaways, and CTA.

title: SMS Marketing Campaign
seoTitle: SMS Text Message Campaign Prompt
metaDescription: Create high-engagement SMS marketing campaigns.
prompt: Create 5 SMS marketing messages for [CAMPAIGN]. Keep under 160 characters each. Include hook, offer details, urgency, and CTA. Personalize with [NAME].

title: Short-Form Video Scripts
seoTitle: TikTok, Reels & Shorts Video Script Prompt
metaDescription: Write short-form video scripts for viral social content.
prompt: Write 5 short-form video scripts (15-60 seconds) for [NICHE]. Include scene descriptions, dialogue, on-screen text, transitions, and trending audio suggestions.

title: Press Release Writer
seoTitle: Professional Press Release Template Prompt
metaDescription: Create press releases for media coverage and PR.
prompt: Write a press release for [NEWS/ANNOUNCEMENT]. Include headline, subheading, dateline, opening paragraph, quotes, details, and company boilerplate.

title: Customer Retention Email Series
seoTitle: Email Retention Strategy Prompt
metaDescription: Create email sequences to reduce churn and increase lifetime value.
prompt: Create a 6-email retention sequence for existing customers of [PRODUCT]. Include engagement emails, exclusive offers, upsell opportunities, and win-back campaigns.

title: Product Launch Marketing Plan
seoTitle: Go-to-Market Strategy Prompt
metaDescription: Plan successful product launches with marketing strategies.
prompt: Create a product launch plan for [PRODUCT]. Include pre-launch teasers, launch day strategy, post-launch follow-up, influencer partnerships, PR, and success metrics.

title: Customer Feedback Survey
seoTitle: Customer Satisfaction Survey Prompt
metaDescription: Create surveys to gather customer insights and feedback.
prompt: Create a customer feedback survey with 15 questions about [PRODUCT/SERVICE]. Include satisfaction scales, open-ended questions, and NPS questions.

title: Rebranding Strategy Guide
seoTitle: Brand Refresh & Rebranding Prompt
metaDescription: Execute successful brand rebranding initiatives.
prompt: Create a rebranding strategy for [COMPANY]. Include current brand audit, new positioning, visual identity changes, messaging updates, and communication plan.

title: Affiliate Program Pitch
seoTitle: Affiliate Partnership Recruitment Prompt
metaDescription: Recruit affiliates with compelling program pitches.
prompt: Create an affiliate program pitch for [PRODUCT/SERVICE]. Include commission structure, promotional materials, support offered, and application process.

title: Marketplace Listing Optimizer
seoTitle: Etsy, Shopify & Marketplace SEO Prompt
metaDescription: Optimize product listings on multiple marketplaces.
prompt: Optimize product listings for [MARKETPLACE]. Improve titles with keywords, write compelling descriptions, optimize tags, and create bullet points for maximum visibility.

title: SEO Audit Checklist
seoTitle: Technical SEO Audit Prompt
metaDescription: Complete SEO audits with actionable improvement recommendations.
prompt: Create an SEO audit checklist for [WEBSITE]. Include on-page SEO, technical SEO, backlink analysis, keyword ranking, page speed, and mobile optimization.

title: YouTube Channel Growth Strategy
seoTitle: YouTube SEO & Channel Optimization Prompt
metaDescription: Develop YouTube channel strategies for audience growth.
prompt: Create a YouTube channel growth strategy for [CHANNEL_NICHE]. Include content calendar, SEO optimization, thumbnail design, playlist strategy, and engagement tactics.

title: Breakup/Win-Back Email
seoTitle: Customer Win-Back Email Campaign Prompt
metaDescription: Create win-back emails to re-engage inactive customers.
prompt: Write a win-back email sequence for inactive customers of [PRODUCT]. Include personal touch, special offer, updated features, and compelling CTA.

title: Micro-Learning Module Creator
seoTitle: Short-Form Educational Content Prompt
metaDescription: Create bite-sized learning modules for skill development.
prompt: Create a 5-minute micro-learning module on [SKILL]. Include learning objectives, 3 key concepts, real-world examples, practice exercise, and takeaway summary.

title: Employee Onboarding Guide
seoTitle: HR Onboarding Process Prompt
metaDescription: Create comprehensive employee onboarding documents.
prompt: Create an employee onboarding guide for [ROLE]. Include first day checklist, company overview, tools setup, training schedule, and success metrics.
